name: Card of Fate
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>運命の一枚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カード・オブ・スピリット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each player chooses 1 card from their Deck, then each player combines it with 4 additional random cards chosen from their Deck by their opponent, then randomly selects 1 of those 5 cards to reveal and add to their hand. Shuffle the rest back into the Decks. You can only activate 1 "Card of Fate" per turn.
eff: Each player chooses 1 card from their Deck, then each player combines it with 4 additional random cards chosen from their Deck by their opponent, then randomly selects 1 of those 5 cards to reveal and add to their hand. Shuffle the rest back into the Decks. You can only activate 1 "Card of Fate" per turn.

action: Reveals cards from your opponent's Deck
Adds from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's hand
